content.full_text:
May 3, 2001

Robert Thompson, Deputy General Counsel
Public Employment Relations Board
Office of the General Counsel
1031 18th Street
Sacramento, CA 95814-4174

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 01-051

Dear Mr. Thompson:

Pursuant to our phone conversation of April 26, 2001, your request for advice on behalf of Anita Martinez has been withdrawn.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Margaret Figeroid
Political Reform Consultant
Legal Division
